name: qit_szilard_substep_companion
classification_note: Finite two-qubit companion row for the stochastic Szilard substep lane. It preserves ordered and scrambled protocol families, adds explicit hold decay, and keeps the result in exact density-operator bookkeeping.

summary.scope_note: QIT-aligned finite two-qubit companion row for the stochastic Szilard substep lane. It separates ordered, scrambled, and passive variants with explicit measurement, feedback, reset, and hold mechanics.
